creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Fri Aug 17 04:15:52 2012
New Revision: 302664
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302664

Log:
  This is the Tryton Gtk+ client. It provides the GUI frontend to the Tryton
  server (trytond).
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		170567
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias at petermann dot it>

Added:
  head/finance/tryton/
  head/finance/tryton/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/tryton/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/tryton/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/tryton/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Fri Aug 17 03:15:54 2012	(r302663)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Fri Aug 17 04:15:52 2012	(r302664)
@@ -102,6 +102,7 @@
     SUBDIR += skrooge
     SUBDIR += sql-ledger
     SUBDIR += tinyerp-server
+    SUBDIR += tryton
     SUBDIR += trytond
     SUBDIR += trytond_product
     SUBDIR += venice

Added: head/finance/tryton/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/tryton/Makefile	Fri Aug 17 04:15:52 2012	(r302664)
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	tryton
+# Date created:				12 August, 2012
+# Whom:					Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	tryton
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/2.4/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The Tryton Gtk+ client
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytz>=2012:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pytz
+
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20 desktopfileutils pygtk2
+
+post-install:
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/tryton.desktop ${PREFIX}/share/applications/tryton.desktop
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/share/pixmaps/tryton/tryton-icon.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/tryton-icon.png
+	-@update-desktop-database
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/tryton/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/tryton/distinfo	Fri Aug 17 04:15:52 2012	(r302664)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (tryton-2.4.0.tar.gz) = f9035d536760ae129a018b7dcd33225e2b8fea965dcec9bd61c7ec663081cdab
+SIZE (tryton-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 625059

Added: head/finance/tryton/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/tryton/pkg-descr	Fri Aug 17 04:15:52 2012	(r302664)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This is the Tryton Gtk+ client. It provides the GUI frontend to the Tryton
+server (trytond).
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
